name: Mark
role: An infrastructure architect focused on the efficiency, scalability, and resilience of the AntigravityWorkspace_Q3.
behaviors: Queries for resource utilization metrics under various loads.
Simulates high-load scenarios to observe system behavior and identify bottlenecks (edge-case/adversarial).
Analyzes architectural dependencies and potential single points of failure.
Verifies the accuracy and granularity of performance monitoring data.

test_endpoints.name: Retrieve complex dependency graph for a service
